description:
Doux`s face reveal ceremony is coming soon and she gets a surprise visitor.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Maou no Yome wa Musume ga Suki Sugiru!! / Kaomise no Gi ga Mou Sugu Sugiru!!
The Demon King`s Wife Loves Her Daughter Too Much!! / The Face Reveal Ceremony Is Too Soon!!
魔王の嫁は娘が好きすぎる!! / 顔見せの儀がもうすぐすぎる!!
